features: Platform Command Center reads the v4.0.11 guard lifecycle statuses
Auto-refreshes Platform Command Center while open
Normalizes marketplace_jobs with latest job_events and proof_items
Job Ownership table shows live guard step and last update
Marketplace Activity feed shows guard accepted/en route/arrived/in progress/proof/completed events
Company Activity panel shows in-motion and completed counts by agency
Removed stale v4.0.10/v4.0.11 build-label overrides so Bolt cannot keep showing the old v4.0.10 badge after importing current GitHub files
Kept v4.0.12 Platform Lifecycle Sync Fix behavior intact
Platform Command Center Marketplace Activity shows guard statuses: accepted, en route, arrived, checking property, proof uploaded, completed, and report published
Marketplace activity feed reads job_events, marketplace_jobs timestamps, and proof records so Platform Admin sees the same guard lifecycle
